question: Drawing S-215 shows interior column cover at columns C-37 through C-42 (level L11 transition) callout missing. What is the required minimum cover, and is any deviation permitted at the L10-to-L11 transition?
Forecast for 5/23 morning is 28°F ambient. We have CJP field welds scheduled at column splice CL-302. Confirm preheat requirements and whether the welds can proceed.

We have a 1/4 in. gap between adjacent mineral fiber boards at L8 north elevation. Manufacturer rep on site says backer rod and sealant is acceptable up to 3/8 in. Confirm spec acceptance and any additional documentation required.

Hardware schedule HW-12 calls out a 4-1/2 in. mortise hinge that is on a 12-week lead. Sub proposes substituting an in-stock 5 in. mortise hinge of equal swing capacity. Is this substitution acceptable?
Per current schedule, mason needs to perform a 14 ft high-lift grout pour at stair shaft SS-3 west jamb to keep ahead of steel erection. Same constraint as RFI-0127 (SS-2). Requesting deviation.
